scripts.release:docker: docker build -t magma-release-agent -f infra/Dockerfile.release . && docker run --rm -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -v "$(pwd):/app" magma-release-agent
scripts.clean: pnpm -C core clean && pnpm -C app clean
scripts.gen:api: pnpm -C core build:openapi && pnpm -C app gen:api
scripts.build: pnpm gen:api && pnpm -C core build && pnpm -C app build
